zh.lifeSummary: 當Bethiah Wood於1660年7月28日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可梅德費爾德時，她的父親Nicholas Wood41歲，母親Mary Pidge35歲。她於1678年2月11日與Ephraim Cutter在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可坎布利其結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1731年9月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年71歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bethiah Wood于1660年7月28日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可梅德費爾德时，她的父亲Nicholas Wood41岁，母亲Mary Pidge35岁。她于1678年2月11日与Ephraim Cutter在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可坎布利其结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1731年9月18日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托享年71岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托。

nameMeanings.name: Wood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: mainly a topographic name for someone who lived in or by a wood, from Middle English wode ‘wood’ (Old English wudu). In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, such as French Bois and Polish Les .
English: in a few cases, a nickname for an eccentric or perhaps a violent person, from Middle English wode ‘frenzied, wild’ (Old English wōd).

variants.name: Woode
meanings: English: variant of   Wood  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 312, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

variants.name: Bois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcide, Antoine, Donat, Marcel, Ovide, Ovila, Raoul, Serge.

French: topographic name for someone living or working in a wood, from (Old) French bois ‘wood’ (from Late Latin boscum ‘bush, shrub, undergrowth’, of ancient Germanic origin), or a habitational name from (Le) Bois, the name of several places in various parts of France. This surname is also found in Haiti. Compare Debois and the most frequent French form Dubois . Compare also Boie , Boies , and Boyce .
English: variant of   Boyce   and   Boyes  .

variants.name: Woods
meanings: English: variant of Wood with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s.

Irish: adopted as a translation of Ó Cuill ‘descendant of Coll’ (see Quill ), or in Ulster of Mac Con Coille ‘son of Cú Choille’, a personal name meaning ‘hound of the wood’, which has also been mistranslated Cox , as if formed with coileach ‘cock, rooster’.

en.lifeSummary: When Bethiah Wood was born on 28 July 1660, in Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Nicholas Wood, was 41 and her mother, Mary Pidge, was 35. She married Ephraim Cutter on 11 February 1678, in Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 18 September 1731, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 71, and was buried in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bethiah Wood est née le 28 juillet 1660, à Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Nicholas Wood, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Mary Pidge, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Ephraim Cutter le 11 février 1678, à Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 18 septembre 1731, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 71 ans, et a été enterrée à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bethiah Wood am 28. Juli 1660 in Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nicholas Wood 41 und ihre Mutter Mary Pidge 35. Sie hat am 11. Februar 1678 in Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten Ephraim Cutter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 18. September 1731 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bethiah Wood è nata il il 28 luglio 1660 nel Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Nicholas Wood, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Mary Pidge, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Ephraim Cutter il 11 febbraio 1678, nel Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 18 settembre 1731, nel Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 71 anni, e fu sepolta a Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Bethiah Woodが1660年7月28日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクメドフィールドで生まれた時，父Nicholas Woodは41歳，母Mary Pidgeは35歳であった。1678年2月11日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスカンブリッジでEphraim Cutterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1731年9月18日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンで71歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスワテルトウンにて埋葬された。

ko.Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운
ko.lifeSummary: Bethiah Wood(이)가 1660년 7월 28일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 메드필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nicholas Wood(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Pidge(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1678년 2월 11일 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 캄브리지에서 Ephraim Cutter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1731년 9월 18일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 71세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bethiah Wood nasceu em 28 de julho de 1660, em Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, Nicholas Wood, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Mary Pidge, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Ephraim Cutter em 11 de fevereiro de 1678, em Cambridge, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 18 de setembro de 1731, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 71 anos, e foi sepultada em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bethiah Wood родилась 28 июля 1660 г. в местности медфиелд, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Nicholas Wood было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Mary Pidge, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ephraim Cutter 11 февраля 1678 г. в местности камбридж, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 18 сентября 1731 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 71 год и была похоронена в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bethiah Wood nació el 28 de julio de 1660, en Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Nicholas Wood, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Mary Pidge, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Ephraim Cutter el 11 de febrero de 1678, en Cambridge, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 18 de septiembre de 1731, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 71 años, y fue sepultada en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.
